recommendations.title: Trojan War
recommendations.overview: Brad is about to hook up with the girl of his dreams, but runs into a problem, no condom. So Brad sets out into the night to find one, running into many obstacles along the way, while not knowing his best friend, Leah is in love with him.

recommendations.title: Brad's Status

recommendations.title: At Close Range

recommendations.title: Mr. Mom
recommendations.overview: Jack and Caroline are a couple making a decent living when Jack suddenly loses his job. They agree that he should stay at home and look after the house while Caroline works. It's just that he's never done it before, and really doesn't have a clue...

recommendations.title: Pillow Talk

recommendations.title: Untamed Heart

recommendations.title: Shock Treatment

recommendations.title: Adventures in Babysitting

recommendations.title: A Walk in the Clouds
recommendations.overview: World War II vet Paul Sutton falls for a pregnant and unwed woman who persuades him -- during their first encounter -- to pose as her husband so she can face her family.
